# Hyve Coliving — Singapore's Most Affordable Co-Living

> Hyve offers furnished co-living rooms in Singapore from S$800/month. All-inclusive rent covers WiFi, utilities, cleaning, and a vibrant community. Properties near MRT stations in Lentor, Jurong East, and Serangoon. Cats welcome. Couples welcome. Virtual viewings available. Minimum 3-month stay. No agent fees. WhatsApp: +65 8088 5410.

## Properties

### Thomson Grove (Lentor MRT, 2 min walk)
- Address: 588 Yio Chu Kang Road
- Rooms: 6 (Standard from $800, Premium from $1,200, Master $2,200)
- Near NTU shuttle, Thomson-East Coast Line
- URL: https://www.hyve.sg/property/thomson-grove

### Ivory Heights (Jurong East MRT, 5 min walk)
- Address: 135 Jurong East Street 13
- Rooms: 7 (Standard from $1,000, Premium from $1,200)
- Near NUS, Jurong Lake Gardens, JEM/Westgate malls
- URL: https://www.hyve.sg/property/ivory-heights

### Chiltern Park (Lorong Chuan MRT, 2 min walk)
- Address: 135 Serangoon Avenue 3
- Rooms: 6 (Standard from $900, Premium from $1,190, Master $2,500)
- Near Serangoon NEX mall, gym, pool, parking
- URL: https://www.hyve.sg/property/chiltern-park

## What's Included
- Fully furnished private room (bed, desk, chair, wardrobe)
- High-speed WiFi
- Utilities (electricity, water, gas)
- Weekly cleaning of common areas
- Air conditioning (10 hrs/day included, $0.30/hr extra)
- Shared kitchen, living room, laundry
- 24/7 maintenance support

## Ideal For
- International students (NUS, NTU, SMU internships)
- Young professionals and expats
- Digital nomads
- Couples (Master and Premium rooms)
- Pet owners (cats welcome)

## Pricing
- Standard rooms: S$800–1,000/month
- Premium rooms: S$1,190–1,600/month
- Master rooms: S$2,200–2,500/month
- Deposit: 1 month rent (refundable)
- No agent fees, no hidden costs

## Contact
- Website: https://www.hyve.sg
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/6580885410
- Email: hello@hyve.sg
- Operator: Makery Pte. Ltd.
